goal: Make the memory engine capable of fully replacing STATE.md by enhancing prime(), replacing infer_feature_from_state(), and updating validation rules.

tasks.name: Enhance prime() with active epic details and plan progress
tasks.action: Add Active Epics section to prime() showing feature_slug, plan_number, child task completion ratio, and handoff snippet from epic metadata.
verify: python3 -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0,'.'); from scripts.memory import prime; from pathlib import Path; output = prime(root=Path('.')); print(output); assert 'kill-state-md' in output or 'Epics' in output or 'Features' in output; print('OK')"

tasks.name: Replace infer_feature_from_state() with memory query
tasks.action: Replace infer_feature_from_state() (lines 50-65) to query memory for in-progress/open epics, fallback to branch name parsing. Import memory at function level.
verify: python3 -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0,'.'); sys.path.insert(0,'scripts'); from workflow_checks import infer_feature_from_state; from pathlib import Path; r = infer_feature_from_state(Path('.')); print(f'Feature: {r}'); assert r; print('OK')"

tasks.name: Update workflow_validate.py — require memory.db instead of STATE.md

planVerify: python3 -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0,'.'); from scripts.memory import prime; print(prime(root=__import__('pathlib').Path('.')))"

python3 -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0,'.'); sys.path.insert(0,'scripts'); from workflow_checks import infer_feature_from_state; r = infer_feature_from_state(__import__('pathlib').Path('.')); print(f'Feature: {r}'); assert r"
commitMessage: feat(kill-state-md): enhance memory engine to replace STATE.md
